_comment: Example metadata schema. Each top-level key is a document filename (as it appears under data/raw). Each value is a metadata object with the fields described in _schema. Copy this file to metadata.json and replace these entries with your own.

_schema.doc_id: string — stable identifier used for deduplication and chunk IDs
_schema.title: string — human-readable document title
_schema.date: string — effective date in YYYY-MM-DD format
_schema.applies_to: string — scope. One of: all_faculty, teaching_staff, non_teaching_staff, research_staff
_schema.document_type: string — chunking hint. One of: policy, guideline, procedure, form, database, legal, general
_schema.domain: string — broad topic bucket. One of: policies, procedures, faculty_info, legal, benefits, academic
_schema.is_current: bool — whether this version is currently in effect
_schema.superseded_by: string|null — doc_id of the newer version that replaced this one, else null
